title: Export Subsidy Reforms and Productivity Improvements: The Case of the Indian Textile and Clothing Sector

summary.about: Whether productivity growth can offset losses from removing Indian textile export subsidies.
summary.audience: Trade ministries, textile firms and industrial-development policymakers.
summary.method: Runs GTAP policy simulations for subsidy removal alone and alongside 3.5% productivity growth.
summary.insights: Subsidy removal alone reduces Indian welfare, while simultaneous productivity investment turns the result modestly positive.
